entry: Marking the book: Our champion mr_d1_t1_s6 is holding strong at 85/100 survivability, and we won 62% of the last 24h of closed trades. We're playing for data, not dollars, and the data keeps getting cleaner.
good_signals: our champion MR_d1_t1_s6 is holding strong at 85/100 survivability
we won 62% of the last 24h of closed trades
the timer study says our best hold captures +0.483%/trade
the drop×bounce lab found a -1.849%/trade edge at drop 2.5%→target 5.5%
regime classification is live on 2 book(s) so we can read the tape before betting
what: A human-voice daily log that surfaces something genuinely good each run.
note: Composed only from true state — never invents wins.
